title: Katamari
description: Control a sphere that absorbs nearby blocks and grows in size
body:
# KatamariIO 
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc94075f17838afef4a8ee2a8257b06baedb9013_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/swtzWXad8Vc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Commands
Permission level: `2` (OP)

- `/katamari size <targets> <value>`
Set collision size for target players.  
Range: `0.01 .. 20.0`

- `/katamari size <target>`
Show current size.

- `/katamari restitution <targets> <value>`
Set restitution coefficient.  
Range: `0.01 .. 1.2`

- `/katamari restitution <target>`
Show restitution coefficient.

- `/katamari ball <targets> <enabled>`
Enable/disable ball mode.

- `/katamari resetBlocks <targets>`
Clear attached blocks and reset collision/render size to `KatamariIO.DEFAULT_BALL_SIZE` (currently `2.0f`).

## NBT command examples
- `/data get entity @s SPM_BlockCount`
- `/data get entity @s SPM_Size`
